name: craft-layer
description: Create unique, animated, informative web apps (CRM, SaaS, landing pages) across React, Tailwind, Vue, Next, Nuxt, and Laravel: /craft-layer:craft chains design-research, token + component build, and a tiered motion-decision system (Framer, anime.js, Three.js/R3F, Vector Lottie/Rive, sprites — each budgeted with reduced-motion + reduced-bundle fallbacks), plus scroll-orchestration (Lenis/ScrollTrigger), kinetic-typography, information-design, and a /craft-layer:audit. Reuses ui-ux + threejs.
